H2: Rectangle Decal FAQs ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Rectangle Decals

Professional Rectangle Decals for Business, Organizing & Promotional Use

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Design Your Rectangle Decals Choose Your Size Select Material Upload Your Artwork Add to Cart Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design Professional Rectangle Decals

Create custom rectangle decals perfect for organizing, labeling, and promotional applications. Our rectangle decals are printed on high-quality vinyl material and offer exceptional durability for both indoor and outdoor use. Whether you need rectangle decals for business identification, shipping labels, or organizational systems, our easy-to-use design tools make it simple to create professional results. See also [save the date magnets](https://www.decals.com/save-the-date-magnets).

Rectangle decals provide the ideal canvas for logos, text, and graphics that require a clean, structured appearance. The rectangular shape works exceptionally well for product labels, warning decals, instructional graphics, and branded promotional materials. Upload your own design or use our online designer to create rectangle decals that meet your exact specifications.

Design Methods for Rectangle Decals

Choose from two convenient design options. Use our intuitive online designer to create rectangle decals from scratch, uploading images or selecting from our extensive clipart library. Alternatively, upload your print-ready files in vector format for the highest quality reproduction of your rectangle decal design.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Rectangle Decal Design & Ordering Process

Our streamlined ordering process makes it easy to create professional rectangle decals. Start by selecting your preferred size and material options, then choose your design method. You can either use our online design tools or upload your own artwork files for printing.

Design Process

Design your rectangle decals using our user-friendly online designer or upload print-ready artwork files. If designing online, upload images or logos from your computer, or choose from our wide selection of clipart and design elements. For uploaded files, we recommend vector formats like EPS for the highest quality rectangle decal printing.

Payment

All rectangle decals must be paid in full before production begins. We accept all major credit cards including VISA, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover. Check payments are also accepted and must be received before your rectangle decals enter production.

Live Order Tracking

After placing your rectangle decal order, you'll receive a unique Live Order Tracking number via email. This system allows you to monitor your rectangle decals through every stage of production and shipping, from order placement to delivery. Click the tracking link in your email to get real-time updates on your order status.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Rectangle Decal Production & Turnaround Times

We offer flexible production timelines ranging from one to five business days to meet your rectangle decal delivery requirements. Production time begins once your artwork upload is complete and approved. If your order requires prepress review or proof approval, the production timeline starts from the approval confirmation.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Our fastest rectangle decal turnaround option for urgent projects. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will begin production the following business day. Emergency same-day production may be available in special circumstances - contact customer service for availability and pricing details.

2 Business Days Express Production

Express production provides quick rectangle decal delivery when you need fast results but have slightly more flexibility than priority timing. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will begin production the following business day.

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular rectangle decal production option, offering an optimal balance of speed and value. This standard timeline works well for most custom rectangle decal projects and includes free production at this turnaround speed.

5 Business Days Economy Production

The most cost-effective rectangle decal production timeline, ideal for larger orders or projects with flexible delivery requirements. This extended production time often qualifies for additional volume discounts on rectangle decal orders.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Cut Options for Rectangle Decals

Choose between die-cut and kiss-cut options for your rectangle decals, each offering distinct advantages depending on your application needs. The main difference lies in how the paper backing is handled during the cutting process.

Die-Cut Rectangle Decals

Die-cutting means we cut through both the vinyl decal material and the paper backing, creating individually separated rectangle decals with no excess material around the edges. Think of it like a cookie cutter approach - each rectangle decal is precisely cut to your design's contour with clean, finished edges. This option works best when you need rectangle decals that can be applied individually without waste material.

Kiss-Cut Rectangle Decals

Kiss-cutting involves cutting only through the vinyl layer while leaving the paper backing intact. This creates rectangle decals with a paper border around each decal, making them easier to peel and position during application. Kiss-cut rectangle decals work well for applications where you need the convenience of easy peeling or when applying multiple decals from a single sheet.

Transfer-Cut Rectangle Decals

Transfer-cut rectangle decals include a transfer tape layer that allows for precise positioning of detailed designs. This cutting method works particularly well for rectangle decals with intricate graphics or text that need to maintain exact positioning during application.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Rectangle Decal Artwork Requirements

Proper artwork preparation ensures your rectangle decals print with optimal quality and accuracy. We accept various file formats, with vector files providing the best results for scalability and crisp detail reproduction.

Preferred File Types

For the highest quality rectangle decal printing, submit vector files in Adobe Illustrator EPS or PDF format. Maximum file size is 100 MB. When submitting these files, convert all fonts to outlines or curves to prevent font substitution issues during printing.

Additional File Formats

We also accept high-resolution raster files including JPG, TIFF, and PNG formats. These work well for photographic rectangle decals or designs that don't require extensive scaling. Ensure adequate resolution for your final rectangle decal size to avoid pixelation.

File Setup Tips

Set up your artwork proportionate to your exact rectangle decal size order. Convert all text elements to outlines before submission. Include bleed only when necessary for full-coverage designs. Never flatten or merge layers in PSD files, and clearly indicate cut lines for all rectangle decal products.

Design Services

If you need assistance with artwork preparation, our vectorizing and recreation services can convert low-resolution images into print-ready files. Most logos and graphics can be recreated starting at $15, with more complex images subject to custom quoting. Contact our design team to discuss your rectangle decal artwork needs.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Your Rectangle Decals

We offer multiple shipping options to deliver your rectangle decals according to your timeline and budget requirements. Shipping time is separate from production time, so factor both into your total delivery expectations.

Shipping Methods

Choose from standard ground shipping, expedited delivery options, or priority overnight service for your rectangle decals. Ground shipping typically takes 3-7 business days depending on your location, while expedited services can deliver your rectangle decals in 1-3 business days.

Shipping Time Expectations

Remember that total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time for your rectangle decals. For example, if you select 3-day production with 2-day shipping, expect your rectangle decals to arrive approximately 5 business days from order approval.

Important Shipping Notes

Economy shipping options may take longer during peak seasons or to remote locations. International rectangle decal shipments require additional processing time and may be subject to customs delays. All shipments include tracking information so you can monitor your rectangle decal delivery progress.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Installing Rectangle Decals

Proper installation ensures your rectangle decals adhere securely and maintain their appearance over time. Follow these steps for professional results whether you're applying rectangle decals to smooth surfaces, equipment, or promotional materials.

Preparing the Surface

Clean the application surface thoroughly with rubbing alcohol or a degreasing agent to remove dirt, oils, and residue. Allow the surface to dry completely before applying your rectangle decals. Smooth, non-porous surfaces like glass, metal, and plastic provide the best adhesion for rectangle decals.

Applying Rectangle Decals

For die-cut rectangle decals, carefully remove the backing paper and position the decal on your prepared surface. Start from one edge and smooth toward the opposite side to eliminate air bubbles. For kiss-cut rectangle decals, peel each decal from the backing sheet and apply using the same smoothing technique.

Removing Transfer Tape

If your rectangle decals include transfer tape, apply the entire design first, then slowly peel away the transfer tape at a 45-degree angle. If any part of the rectangle decal lifts with the transfer tape, press it back down and continue removing the tape more slowly.

Installation Tips

Apply rectangle decals in temperatures between 50-90°F for optimal adhesion. Use a squeegee or credit card to smooth out air bubbles during application. For curved surfaces, work in small sections and use a heat gun or hair dryer to help the rectangle decal conform to the surface contours.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Rectangle Decals?

Rectangle decals are custom printed vinyl graphics cut into rectangular shapes, designed for adhesive application to various surfaces. Made from durable vinyl material with weather-resistant inks, these decals provide long-lasting identification, labeling, and promotional solutions. Rectangle decals are commonly used for business signage, product labeling, organizational systems, and equipment identification. They can be applied to smooth surfaces like glass, metal, plastic, and painted walls, making them versatile tools for both indoor and outdoor applications.

Order Professional Rectangle Decals Today

Design your custom rectangle decals with our easy-to-use online tools or upload your existing artwork for professional printing. Our rectangle decals are manufactured using premium vinyl materials and precision cutting technology to ensure consistent quality and reliable performance. Whether you need rectangle decals for business branding, organizational labeling, or promotional campaigns, we deliver professional results with fast turnaround times.

Choose from multiple sizes, materials, and cutting options to create rectangle decals that meet your specific requirements. Our production team handles everything from artwork review to final quality inspection, ensuring your rectangle decals arrive ready for immediate application. Custom hard hat stickers and dry erase wall decals offer additional options for specialized applications.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Rectangle Decal FAQs

What material is used for rectangle decals?

Rectangle decals are made from high-quality vinyl material with permanent adhesive backing. The vinyl is weather-resistant and suitable for both indoor and outdoor applications, providing durability that lasts several years under normal conditions.

Can I reposition my rectangle decal after application?

Rectangle decals made with permanent adhesive are designed for one-time application and cannot be repositioned once applied. However, during the initial application process, you have a brief window to adjust positioning before the adhesive fully sets.

Are rectangle decals waterproof for outdoor use?

Yes, rectangle decals are printed with weather-resistant inks on waterproof vinyl material. They can withstand rain, snow, and UV exposure, making them suitable for outdoor applications on vehicles, equipment, and exterior signage.

What surfaces work best for rectangle decal application?

Rectangle decals adhere best to smooth, clean surfaces such as glass, metal, plastic, and painted walls. Textured or porous surfaces may reduce adhesion strength and longevity of your rectangle decals.

How long do rectangle decals last outdoors?

When properly applied to suitable surfaces, rectangle decals typically last 3-5 years outdoors. Actual lifespan depends on weather exposure, surface type, and environmental conditions in your specific location.

What file format should I use for rectangle decal artwork?

For best results, submit artwork in vector formats like Adobe Illustrator EPS or PDF with fonts converted to outlines. High-resolution raster files (JPG, PNG, TIFF) also work well for photographic rectangle decal designs.

Can rectangle decals be removed without damaging surfaces?

Rectangle decals can typically be removed by heating with a hair dryer and peeling slowly. Some adhesive residue may remain on certain surfaces but can usually be cleaned with adhesive remover or rubbing alcohol.
